sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 7.17 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.7)

statement.latex: Is the number of maximal subgroups of the finite group$G$at most$|G| - 1$? Editors' remarks:\/ This is proved for$G$soluble (G.\,E.\,Wall, J.\,\,Austral. Math. Soc., { 2} (1961--62), 35--59) and for symmetric groups${ S} _n$for sufficiently large$n$(M.\,Liebeck, A.\,Shalev, J.\,\,Combin. Theory, Ser.\,A, 75 (1996), 341--352); it is also proved (M.\,W.\,Liebeck, L.\,Pyber, A.\,Shalev, J.~Algebra, 3...
